variant_name: 陆姝仪 — 满月宴坦白重生真相
trigger: 昭昭满月宴上，陆姝仪不请自来，当众承认自己也重生，并坦白失贞局是自己设计。

appearance_delta.face: 神色由柔弱转为苍白冷静，仍有脆弱底色，但多了认命与决绝
appearance_delta.body: 身形依旧纤细，却比以往少了单纯依附姿态，站得更硬撑
appearance_delta.hair: 发髻保持得体完整，显示她是有准备而来，不再是事故中的凌乱状态
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 在喜庆宴厅中呈现格格不入的苍白感，柔弱外表下终于显露主动设计命运的锋利真相

costume_override.outfit: 赴宴用的清雅正式浅色襦裙，依旧不张扬，但较日常更整齐庄重，以适配满月宴场合

visual_reference: realistic historical chinese drama style, delicate ancient chinese woman at a full moon banquet, pale skin, soft watery eyes but calm resigned expression, slim fragile body, elegant neat bun with subtle pearl ornaments, formal pale pink and off-white hanfu, festive red banquet hall in background, carrying the aura of confession and tragic calculation, gentle beauty with hidden sharpness
